text_block_list.text:
Over the last few training sessions, Gold City's
progress has been somewhat stagnant.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I just can't! How can I be this off when I'm so
on point when modeling?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Maybe that's the key. I should imagine I'm
on the runway.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(It's like parading the final outfit at a show. Gotta
make an impact with every step.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(A long stride to assert dominance. One foot in
front of the other, no hesitation.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Give them a show with the turn. Sharp and bold.
Center of gravity steady, no faltering.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh... of course. Keeping full control over my
movements is my specialty.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: If I keep that mentality when running...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, weren't there a few videos in your office
explaining running form?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Show me all of them! There's something I want to
try.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Arm swing needs to be more forceful... My ankles
aren't absorbing the shock of hitting the
ground...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: Amazing! That's a really good time!
Amazing! That's a really good time!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Guess the key was visualizing what I'm supposed
to be doing. There's still room for improvement,
though!

This improvement in Gold City's form has
increased the sharpness of her running.
